about.title: About
about.subtitle: Me
about.description1: I'm a versatile FullStack Developer and UI/UX design enthusiast with over 4 years of professional experience crafting digital experiences that bridge the gap between complex engineering and intuitive design.
about.description2: My approach combines technical rigor with a deep understanding of user behavior. I specialize in building scalable, performant applications using modern stacks like React, Node.js, and Python, always keeping the user at the center of every architectural decision.
